generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. But what happens when our partners don't pull their weight? Look at the crumbling infrastructure in key NATO countries - roads, bridges, and air defenses that can't handle their share of the burden. We're left holding the bag while they lag behind. Our tax dollars are better spent shoring up our own defenses than propping up allies who won't invest in themselves. Remember, a strong America starts with putting America first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
